hero.h1_pre: Your reliable partner for all your
hero.subtitle: We prepare your tax return professionally and personally — in Braunschweig and Bonn. Advisory services also available in English.

services.heading: Our Services
services.s1_desc: Professional preparation of your annual income tax return — complete and on time.
services.s2_desc: Careful review of your tax assessment and filing of objections where needed.
services.s3_desc: Personal advice on your tax situation — upon request also in English.
services.s4_desc: Child benefit, child allowances, parental benefit and tax relief for families.
services.s5_desc: Advice on income from abroad, double taxation agreements and more.
services.s6_desc: Tax treatment of pensions, annuities and retirement benefits.

membership.heading: Fair membership fees
membership.body: Become a member and benefit from our comprehensive service at a fair annual fee. No hidden costs — everything included.

international.heading: Also for foreign residents
international.body: We offer our advisory services in English — for international professionals, expats and anyone who is not confident in German.

radio.title: Radio Okerwelle
radio.subtitle: Listen to our tax broadcasts on topics for retirees, employees and more.

final_cta.heading: Ready for your tax return?
final_cta.body: Contact us today — we will help you quickly and easily.

footer.tagline: Professional tax advisory for employees, retirees and families — in Braunschweig and Bonn.

kontakt.heading: Write to us
kontakt.note: Note: Please contact the advisory office nearest to you for local appointments. Information about offices near you is available by phone or email.
kontakt.form_body: The online form will be available shortly. Please contact us directly by email in the meantime.

leistungen.heading: Our Services
leistungen.cta_body: Contact us for a no-obligation consultation or become a member directly.

mitgliedschaft.heading: Become a Member
mitgliedschaft.why_body: As a member of Ring der Steuerzahler e.V. you benefit from a comprehensive advisory and processing service for your tax return — at a fair annual fee with no hidden costs. Our experienced advisors take care of your tax matters personally and maximise your refund.
mitgliedschaft.limited_sub: Only within the statutory scope of authorisation (§ 4 No. 11 StBerG)
mitgliedschaft.limit_note: Note: Advisory authorisation is limited to members whose income (other than wages, pensions etc.) does not exceed €18,000 (single) / €36,000 (couples).

karriere.heading: Join our team
karriere.body: We are a growing income tax assistance association with locations in Braunschweig and Bonn and are looking for motivated employees to strengthen our team. If you have training as a tax clerk or a comparable qualification, we look forward to your application.
karriere.note: We kindly ask for applications by email.

radio_page.heading: Radio Okerwelle
radio_page.subtitle: Our tax broadcasts to listen back
